SEARCH
Package com.thogicalsplont.tgwands.block.entity

Class ModEntities

java.lang.Object
com.thogicalsplont.tgwands.block.entity.ModBlockEntities
public class ModEntities extends Object
Registers custom entities for the TGWands mod.

This class handles the creation and registration of all custom block entity types used by the mod.

Example: WaterPrisonBlockEntity

Since:
0.1.0

  • Field Details

    • BLOCK_ENTITIES

      public static final net.neoforged.neoforge.registries.DeferredRegister<net.minecraft.world.level.block.entity.BlockEntityType<?>> BLOCK_ENTITIES
      Deferred registry for block entities, linked to the mod ID.

    • WATER_PRISON_ENTITY

      public static final Supplier<net.minecraft.world.level.block.entity.BlockEntityType<WaterPrisonBlockEntity>> WATER_PRISON_ENTITY
      Water Prison Block Entity Type.

      Represents the block entity logic for WaterPrisonBlock. This block entity handles ticking logic and lifespan of the water prison.
